name: GustyCube
content: Myfer is a very enthusiastic programmer. He is always ready to learn something, and committed to projects. He constantly improves his skill, and is eager to share it. I highly recommend him.

name: Head
content: Myfer is really dedicated to his work and puts mass amounts of effort into his work. He is really a great programmer and of course a great guy, he does his work really well and I highly recommend  him.
